name: SwiftFastPass
description: A Swift-based, offline password manager built on KeePassKit, featuring multi-layer encryption, biometric authentication, password generation, and a fully localized English–Chinese interface. 一款基于 Swift 开发的本地离线密码管理器，使用 KeePassKit 构建，支持多层级加密、生物识别认证、密码生成，以及完整的中英双语界面本地化。
